rationale: The two ensures conjuncts each carry a `wf` whose hidden `forall|i:usize|` mentions `data@[i as int]` -- z3 doesn't line them up across the two post-states. Re-assert each forall, use `view == Set::empty()` to flip the wf-implication and force `data@[i as int] == false` for both runs, then close with Seq extensionality (`=~=`) on `data.seq@` plus trivial equalities on `set@` and `len`.
